mapper.select:
SELECT p.id ,p.pool_name ,p.pool_type ,p.market_codes ,p.variety_codes ,p.description ,p.max_capacity FROM ip_investment_pool p WHERE p.status = 'enabled' AND p.is_deleted = 0
AND p.id IN
#{poolId}
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ip_investment_pool child WHERE child.parent_id = p.id AND child.status = 'enabled' AND child.is_deleted = 0 ) ORDER BY p.outer_sort ASC ,p.inner_sort ASC ,p.id ASC

SELECT si.wind_code AS securityCode ,si.short_name AS securityShortName ,si.security_type ,CONCAT_WS(',' ,IF(si.wind_code_sh IS NOT NULL AND si.wind_code_sh != '', 'SH', NULL) ,IF(si.wind_code_sz IS NOT NULL AND si.wind_code_sz != '', 'SZ', NULL) ,IF(si.wind_code_nib IS NOT NULL AND si.wind_code_nib != '', 'IB', NULL) ,IF(si.wind_code_bj IS NOT NULL AND si.wind_code_bj != '', 'BJ', NULL) ,IF(si.wind_code_nbc IS NOT NULL AND si.wind_code_nbc != '', 'NBC', NULL) ) AS marketCodeText ,si.issuer ,si.rating_bond ,si.maturity_date FROM rrs_securityinfo si
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ip_pool_status ips WHERE ips.security_code = si.wind_code AND ips.target_pool_id = #{poolId} AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 )
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ip_pool_status ips WHERE ips.security_code = si.wind_code AND ips.target_pool_id = #{poolId} AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 )
AND si.wind_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{securityCode}, '%')
AND si.short_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{securityShortName}, '%')
AND (
si.wind_code_sh IS NOT NULL AND si.wind_code_sh != '' si.wind_code_sz IS NOT NULL AND si.wind_code_sz != '' si.wind_code_nib IS NOT NULL AND si.wind_code_nib != '' si.wind_code_bj IS NOT NULL AND si.wind_code_bj != '' si.wind_code_nbc IS NOT NULL AND si.wind_code_nbc != '' 1 = 0
)
ORDER BY si.id DESC

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ip_investment_pool p WHERE p.id = #{poolId} AND p.status = 'enabled' AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ip_investment_pool child WHERE child.parent_id = p.id AND child.status = 'enabled' AND child.is_deleted = 0 )
